40.reason: [When pop() returns -1 due to an empty stack, the code still prints "-1 " because it only checks `if (ele != -1)` after calling pop(), but pop() already printed "error ". This leads to both "error " and "-1 " being printed for an empty pop, which is incorrect. The logic should avoid printing the returned value if an error occurred.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [When pop() returns -1 due to an empty stack, the code still prints "-1 " because it only checks `if (ele != -1)` after calling pop(), but pop() already printed "error ". This leads to both "error " and "-1 " being printed for an empty pop, which is incorrect. The logic should avoid printing the returned value if an error occurred.]
